title: SuperDuperWhitelist
description: More than just a whitelist plugin
body:
## ![Superduperwhitelist Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8f2c615c7db433c8f18d4de418f7719c574743c.png)

## Ideal for use on SMP servers!
This plugin includes a whitelist system for any purpose and server, thanks to the ability to customize everything for yourself.


## Features:
 - **Whitelisting:** both regular and temporary
  
 - **Flexible customization:** Decide what people not on the whitelist can do and what they can't, in a convenient plugin config. Extensive management of the capabilities of non-whitelisted people and of the plugin messages..
  
 - Mini-message support(New colour codes etc.) 
  
 - Plugin is cool because I said so
  
## Commands:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- /wl or /wl help - list of commands available to the user
- /wl add [player] - add a player to the white list
- /wl tempadd [player] [time(s/m/h/d)] - temporarily add a player to the whitelist
- /wl del [player] - remove a player from the whitelist
- /wl on/off - turn on/off the whitelist
- /wl list - list of players in the white list
- /wl reload - reload the plugin config and messages

</details>


## Permissions:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- superduperwhitelist.wl - /wl and /wl help
- superduperwhitelist.wl.add - /wl add
- superduperwhitelist.wl.tempadd - /wl tempadd
- superduperwhitelist.wl.del - /wl del
- superduperwhitelist.wl.list - /wl list
- superduperwhitelist.wl.reload - /wl reload
- superduperwhitelist.wl.all - all commands

</details>
